products.title: WWC Hollywood Nights Goni
products.body_html: The WWC Hollywood Nights Goni is a vibrant pink/purple goni with yellow tips. This piece from World Wide Corals is extremely similar to our RRG Strawberry Burst Goni (as well as the SBB Care Bear Goni). The main difference is this seems to have a darker base (more purple).

products.title: OG Weeping Willow
products.body_html: This is by far the closest thing to Jake Adam's Weeping Willow. This incredible piece has long tentacles with bright white polyp tips. This Willow grows an extremely long stalk. This is by far the nicest leather coral available in the hobby. This piece is lineaged to Kevin AKA CoralAddict645 on Reef2Reef.

products.title: Holy Grail Micromussa
products.body_html: The Holy Grail Micro is a fast-growing and highly desirable micromussa. This piece has. a yellow mouth surrounded by an outer red ring. It is extremely bright and is a hardy piece, perfect for beginners and high-end collectors.

products.title: CCA Crayola Meltdown Chalice
products.body_html: The CCA Crayola Meltdown Chalice is one of the nicest high end chalices on the market. This piece gets blues, purples, greens, oranges, reds and yellows. It is an incredible piece that gets more colors as it grows.

products.title: Fairy Fart Zoas
products.body_html: These iconic zoas are orange but can develop green, purple and yellow. Polyps can get large.

products.title: BKCHEM The Grinch
products.body_html:
The BKCHEM The Grinch is a special piece that is one of the nicest torches in the hobby. This incredible piece has a base green that is darker than other holy grail torches, which complements the neon yellow throughout the tentacles. Must have for any high-end collector. 

Second picture is of the mother.

products.title: RRG Paint Splatter Jawbreaker
products.body_html:
The Reef Regeneration Paint Splatter Jawbreaker is one of the nicest strains of jawbreaker out there. This strain is essentially what is now being called a "Purple Monster," as it gets small streaks of purple. However, this piece stands out due to the bright green and red colors that streak throughout this mushroom. 

First and last pictures are of the piece for sale.

products.title: TG Platycakes Platygyra
products.body_html:
This incredibly rare Platygyra has an orange, yellow, and green center, with a purple ring and then capped by the electric sky blue rim. This is one of the rarest and slowest-growing corals in the hobby, it is a true collector piece. 

Second picture is of our mother colony.

products.title: Mellow Yellow Bounce Mushroom
products.body_html: The Mellow Yellow Bounce Mushroom is a very unique bounce mushroom where each tentacle is a developed bounce. This special shroom is mainly a light white/blue color with yellow/green bounces.

products.title: Japanese Deep Water Weeping Willow
products.body_html: This amazing Japanese Deep Water Weeping Willow is one of the nicest leather corals you will find. This piece has neon green polyp tips with extremely long stalks. This high-end collectors piece will add movement and color to any reef.

products.title: RRG Confetti Master Bower
products.body_html: The RRG Confetti Master Bower is an extremely special bowerbanki. This incredible piece has extremely colorful baby polyps, with a pinwheel of rainbow colors. Mature polyps are dark gray/blue with a bright red/orange skirt and a deep green mouth. A true collectors piece.

products.title: Acid Trip Echinata
products.body_html: The Acid Trip Echinata is an insane acan thats gets a wide variety of different colors. The mouth gets a bright orange with green streaks through it. This is an easier coral to grow.

products.title: RRG Orange Creamsicle Bowerbanki
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Orange Creamsicle Bower is a special orange bower. This piece is a bright orange with white/blue speckles throughout the bower. This piece is relatively slow growing and prefers large feedings.

products.title: JF Cold Fusion Monti
products.body_html: This incredible montipora is an very rare grafted monti that is a dark green with purple streaks. This is a must have piece for any monti collector.

products.title: Oregon Tort
products.body_html: One of the OG acros, the oregon tort is so blue that it is very difficult to photograph.

products.title: TSA Blueberry Fields Monti
products.body_html: This beautiful monti is mainly green with bright blue polyps. It can encrust over surfaces and it can also plate and spiral.

products.title: CB El Corazon Zoas
products.body_html: Similar to burning embers, these orange zoas will surely be one of the brightest zoas in any collection.

products.title: RRG Princess Peach Torch
products.body_html: The RRG Princess Peach Torch is a very unique piece with pink tips and blue/green tentacles that get gold streaks. This piece is very hardy and is a great piece for any collector.

products.title: ECC Rainbow Road Micromussa
products.body_html: The ECC Rainbow Road Micromussa is a stunning rainbow micromussa that has a bright orange mouth, surrounded by a neon green and orange ring. This is by far the nicest and rarest micromussa we have seen in the hobby. A true collectors piece.

products.title: RRG Gummy Bear Bounce Mushroom
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Gummy Bear Bounce Mushroom is a unique magic carpet variant that gets bright green bounces. This piece also has a unique blue/green base skin color that gives it a very special look.

products.title: RRG Monsters Inc. Acan Echinata
products.body_html: The RRG Monsters Inc. Acan Echinata is a brilliant neon green acan with light blue highlights. This piece gets large, fleshy polyps and can even get plenty of reds and orange streaks throughout. This is a wonderful beginner-friendly acan.

products.title: Bleeding Apple Bower
products.body_html: Bleeding apple bowers develop both green and red pigments, and are one of the hardiest bowerbankis.

products.title: OG ASD Holy Grail Torch 4 Heads Splitting
products.body_html:
The nicest torch in our collection and one of the most desired in the hobby, the OG ASD Holy Grail is an incredible piece with bright blue tips and yellow tentacles that become green towards the mouth. This is not one of the many newly imported "holy grails" that will either not be as bright as the original or will melt in captivity. This is a fully aquacultured piece that has been growing in captivity for years. This is one of the hardiest torches in our collection. 

This piece was one large head that is currently splitting into 4 heads. Second picture is an example of our mother colony.

products.title: RRG Lemonade Bounce Mushroom
products.body_html:
The Reef Regeneration Lemonade Bounce Mushroom is one of our favorite shrooms. This shroom gets very large, and it is a strong grower. It gets massive yellow and white bounces, and yellow streaks are present on every vesicle. This is a true collector's piece. 

Second picture is of the mother. This piece is on a large Ocean Wonders black plug.

products.title: RR Rainbow Loom
products.body_html: The RR Rainbow Loom is a unique piece that is a bright green base with yellow and purple tips. This acro loves high light and high flow. Higher light brings out the bright purple and yellow tips.

products.title: SniperSPS (Hugo's) Rainbow Bowerbanki
products.body_html: The SniperSPS Rainbow Bower is without a doubt one of the nicest corals in the hobby. This highly desirable bower gets reds, oranges, greens, and yellows. Like all high end bowers, it is extremely slow growing. This incredible piece is extremely hard to find, and is seldom available. Do not miss this chance to grab the ultimate collector's coral.

products.title: CB Fire Shroom
products.body_html: The CB Fire Shroom is a truly rainbow bounce mushroom. This coral gets red, orange, purple, and yellow vesicles. These mushrooms can get big, some individual polyps stretching over 4+ inches! This is a wonderful addition to any mushroom collection.

products.title: GSC Wonderland Goni
products.body_html:
The GSC Wonderland Goni is one of the most sought after goniopora. This crazy piece has every color in the rainbow, while also being a highly desired long-lashed goni. This will be the standout in any collection.

Second picture is of the mother colony.

products.title: POTO Flamethrower
products.body_html:
The POTO Flamethrower is one of the most desired acropora in the hobby. This stunning piece is almost entirely bright red with a yellow encrusting base. This piece is slow growing, and prefers higher light and flow to help it color up.

Second picture is of the mother colony.

products.title: JF Azz Krak Zoas
products.body_html: The JF Azz Krak Zoas are one of the nicest zoas in the hobby. This high-end piece has a unique orange/green color mix with orange speckles surrounding a black inner ring. This is an incredible piece.

products.title: Hologram Hammer
products.body_html: The Hologram Hammer is one of the nicest pieces in the hobby. This unique branching hammer has iridescent purple tipped tentacles with bright yellow/green rings around the purple tip.

products.title: RRG Shirley Temple
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Shirley Temple Goni is a beautiful orange and pink goni that gets split colors throughout. This piece is one of the nicest gonis in our collection, and is sure to be loved by any collector.

products.title: BKCHEM Willy Wonka
products.body_html: The BKCHEM Willy Wonka Hammer is the nicest hammer we have seen. This piece has bright orange tentacles with green and blue accents. This hammer also has extremely bouncy tentacles when grown in UV light.

products.title: CCA Crayola Meltdown Chalice
products.body_html: The CCA Crayola Meltdown Chalice is one of the nicest high end chalices on the market. This piece gets blues, purples, greens, oranges, reds and yellows. It is an incredible piece that gets more colors as it grows.

products.title: GB Rainbow Troll Zoas
products.body_html: The GB Rainbow Troll is a unique zoanthid with a bright yellow/orange center and a red ring around the outside of the face. This is one of the rarer collector zoanthids.

products.title: Blue Candy Cane
products.body_html: The Blue Candy Cane coral is a unique blue piece that is harder to find than it's green counterpart. This coral grows as long stems which resemble candy canes. An easy piece that is perfect for beginners.

products.title: Oregon Tort
products.body_html: One of the OG acros, the oregon tort is so blue that it is very difficult to photograph.

products.title: JF Raja Rampage Chalice
products.body_html: The JF Raja Rampage Chalice is a vibrant neon green with yellow eyes that are surrounded by a dark green/black ring.

products.title: RRG Rainbow Road Favia
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Rainbow Road Favia is one of the nicest encrusting corals we have ever come across. This stunning piece features a baby blue mouth, outlined by neon green, yellow and then red rings. This Favia also develops grafts, some frags can develop a mainly teal outer ring.

products.title: RRG Dragon's Breath Bower
products.body_html: The RRG Dragon's Breath Bower is a very unique and high-end Bowerbanki with a bright red ring surrounding a dark blue center. Like all bowers, this piece is slow-growing and prefers relatively low light and flow.

products.title: Luigi's Mansion Zoa
products.body_html: The Luigi's Mansion Zoa is a relatively new high-end piece. This beautiful micro-zoa has a bright red center surrounded by a green and orange ring.

products.title: JF Bloodshot Zoa
products.body_html: The JF Bloodshot Zoa is a classic high-end piece that has a bright green ring with a red center. This is a must-have piece for any high-end collector.

products.title: RRG Shirley Temple
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Shirley Temple Goni is a beautiful orange and pink goni that gets split colors throughout. This piece is one of the nicest gonis in our collection, and is sure to be loved by any collector.

products.title: Grand Master Goni
products.body_html: The Grand Master Goni is one of the nicest and most desirable goniopora in the hobby. This incredible piece is a bright orange with green tints. This is one of the hardiest high-end gonis, and it prefers high light and medium to low flow.

products.title: Holy Grail Micromussa
products.body_html: The Holy Grail Micro is a fast-growing and highly desirable micromussa. This piece has. a yellow mouth surrounded by an outer red ring. It is extremely bright and is a hardy piece, perfect for beginners and high-end collectors.

products.title: WWC AOI Zoas
products.body_html: The classic blue zoa, great for beginners with it's ease of care and fast growth.

products.title: TSA Rainbow Fusion
products.body_html: The TSA Rainbow Fusion is an incredible Tenuis that has a neon green base with bright blue tips and growth. The polyps can get bright red and orange, and new polyps can come out yellow. This is a great piece for any high-end collector.

products.title: Gold Rim Ultra Splatter Branching Hammer
products.body_html: This beautiful branching hammer is more than an average splatter hammer. This piece gets bright gold rims under on each tentacle. It also has green splatters on the purple tentacles and purple splatters on the green tentacles. Truly one of the nicest branching hammers we have come across.

products.title: TSA Bill Murray Acropora
products.body_html: A classic acropora, the TSA Bill Murray is a yellow/orange with bright orange corallite tips. This acro tables when fully grown out.

products.title: RRG Rainbow Chalice
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Rainbow Chalice is a special piece that develops greens, purples, oranges and reds. This high end chalice is slow growing and prefers lower light to bring out additional colors.

products.title: RRG Captain America Master Bower
products.body_html:
The RRG Captain America Master Bower is a warpaint bower on steroids! This insane piece has the classic warpaint colors of red, purple, and teal; but it also has neon greens! This is a dream piece for any bower collector.

Second picture is of the mother colony.

products.title: MattV Time Machine Tenuis
products.body_html: The MattV Time Machine Tenuis is one of the nicest high-end acros with it's purple corallites and pink/purple polyps. It can also develop yellow accents all around the coral. It gets a green base that can also develop blues and oranges depending on light availability.

products.title: RRG Poison Apple Bowerbanki
products.body_html:
The Reef Regeneration Poison Apple Bowerbanki is one of the nicest master bowers we have seen. This incredible piece has the staple neon green and red of a bleeding apple bower; but what really sets it apart is the bright blue/purple colors that streak throughout the piece. This is a must have collector's master bower. 

Second picture is of our mother colony.

products.title: Doughgirl Bounce Mushroom
products.body_html: The Doughgirl Bounce Mushroom is one of the nicest mushrooms in the hobby. This bright yellow yuma sports the same bounce shapes and patterns as the RRC Doughboy bounce mushroom. This is one of the slower growing mushrooms in the hobby, therefore making it much rarer and higher-end than the doughboy or godzilla yuma. This is a true collectors piece.

products.title: UC Flame Boy Favia
products.body_html: This is one of the brightest corals in the hobby. This stunning piece is a true rainbow, it has oranges, reds, greens and yellows. It is an incredible piece that is very easy to care for and fast growing.

products.title: WWC Pink Boobies Chalice
products.body_html: The WWC Pink Boobies chalice is a beautiful bright pink chalice with yellow eyes. This is a beginner-friendly piece that is extremely hardy and fast growing. In high light the bright pink colors will develop.

products.title: Neon Green Rhodactis
products.body_html: This easy to care for mushroom is a great piece to add for any beginner. It is a bright neon green and loves to split and divide down the middle.

products.title: RRG Master Bowerbanki
products.body_html:
The RRG Master Bowerbanki is an incredible piece that is a deep red with yellow streaks. This piece is unique as the face will get a dark black ring around the feeding tentacles, and the mouth gets a bright yellow ring on the center with light yellow streaks around the mouth. 

First and third pictures are of the frag available.

products.title: RRG Scorched Earth Plate
products.body_html: The RRG Scorched Earth Plate is an insane neon orange plate coral. . The orange color is unlike anything we have ever seen in the hobby - it is truly a glowing neon orange. This piece gets puffy which makes it appear very bouncy. This will be the standout coral in any aquarium.

products.title: RRG Sub Zero Rhodactis
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Sub Zero Rhodactis is a beautiful blue and orange mushroom. It is a primarily orange mushroom with a blue center. This is an extremely hardy and fast growing mushroom, great for beginners.

products.title: TGC Northern Crush
products.body_html: The TGC Northern Crush is a rare piece that has a very unique growth pattern and color structure. This piece gets bright orange polyps and a dark purple base color. New growth tips are bright purple/blue.

products.title: RRG Pink Princess Goni
products.body_html: The RRG Pink Princess Goni is an insane piece that sports bright pink tentacles with a neon teal interior. This is a fully aquacultured goni that will do very well adjusting to your home system. This is a truly special collectors goni - one that is seldom available.

products.title: RRG Purple Glitter Goni
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Purple Glitter Goni has been aquacultured for years, it is extremely dark purple/blue and has the glitter pattern both on the face and stalk of each polyp. Last photo is the mother colony, photographed in pure white led lights.

products.title: RRC Supreme Tenuis
products.body_html: The RRC Supreme is one of the nicest Tenuis in the hobby. This amazing piece is a bright red and yellow base with red polyps. This piece is one of the most high-end acros in the hobby.

products.title: RRU Bleeding Avenger Acro
products.body_html: The RRU Bleeding Avenger is one of the nicest collector acropora in the hobby. This acro has an orange skin with green and yellow colors at new growth. The bleeding avenger also has red/orange polyps, making it a truly special acropora, one that is very similar to the RRC Jawdropper.

products.title: RRG Blueberry Blast Acro
products.body_html: The RRG Blueberry Blast Acro is a very unique piece that gets thick blue/purple branches with green encrusting growth. This piece also gets bright pink/purple rings around the leading polyps on new branches.

products.title: Red People Eaters
products.body_html: People Eaters are famous for their bright green mouths. This version can be dark to bright red depending on lighting. Very easy to care for, great for beginners.

products.title: Powerball Bounce Mushroom
products.body_html: The Powerball Bounce Mushroom is one of the nicest bounce mushrooms in the hobby. This incredible rhodactis sports extremely colorful and large bounces, and various smaller bounces that pop up as well. These mushrooms do not get large, and are a fantastic addition to any collection.

products.title: Splatter Grail Hammer
products.body_html: The Splatter Grail Hammer is an incredible piece that gets bright yellow splatter tentacles, purple tipped tentacles, and green tentacles. There are splatter colorations throughout the hammer. This is an incredible piece that will standout in any collection.

products.title: LA Lakers Scroll Coral
products.body_html: The LA Lakers Scroll Coral is a unique piece that is a rarity in most reef tanks. This piece has a purple base color with yellow polyps and a yellow growth rim. It is easy to care for.

products.title: Kiwi Sunrise Yuma
products.body_html: The Kiwi Sunrise Yuma is a very unique piece that has a bright green base with orange colorations throughout the coral. This is a beginner friendly yuma and is sure to brighten up your reef!

products.title: RRG Hulk Bounce Mushroom
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Hulk Bounce Mushroom is a very unique piece that is a bright neon green mushroom with bright white and green bounces. This is a great beginners mushroom as it is very easy to care for.

products.title: CB Rainbow Master Bower
products.body_html:
The CB Rainbow Master Bower is an incredible piece that has a dark blue center and a red, yellow, and green outer ring. It develops very bouncy flesh and is one of the most unique bowers we have seen. This rare bowerbanki is a hard piece to find - perfect for any collector. 

Second and third pictures are of the mother colony.

products.title: ASD Master Blaster Bower
products.body_html:
The ASD Master Blaster Bower is a very unique master bowerbanki that is mainly a dark red coloration with turquoise and purple streaks. This is an extremely rare piece, only a couple frags were released years ago. This one loves to eat! These bowers will grow faster with lots of food. 

This piece has a large baby growing on the side of it. Last picture is in high-def.

products.title: Miami Hurricane
products.body_html: The Miami Hurricane chalice is a very easy to care for and fast growing chalice. It gets yellow, orange, and red eyes making it a very desirable piece.

products.title: RRG Gummy Bear Bounce Mushroom
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Gummy Bear Bounce Mushroom is a unique magic carpet variant that gets bright green bounces. This piece also has a unique blue/green base skin color that gives it a very special look.

products.title: CC Cloudberries Chalice
products.body_html:
The CC Cloudberries Chalice is an extremely unique piece that has orange and neon blue stripes running through it. This is a must have piece for any chalice collector. 

Second picture is of the mother colony.

products.title: Poseidon Discosoma
products.body_html: The Poseidon Discosoma is a unique mushroom that has a dark blue base and gets blue bubbles. It can also develop a green outer ring which gives it a unique appearance. It can grow fast as it "walks" around it's surface and drops clones from its foot.

products.title: Godbeast Zoas
products.body_html: Godbeasts are one of the most high-end zoas in the hobby. This incredible zoa has a glittery face with a bright orange mouth. This will be a standout in any aquarium. A must have for any zoa collector.

products.title: RRG Rainbow Dynamite Chalice
products.body_html: The RRG Rainbow Dynamite Chalice is one of the nicest pieces we have seen. This amazing chalice has almost every color, including orange, yellow, green, red, and blue. This is a must have piece for any collector.

products.title: Great Owl Zoas
products.body_html: Best micro zoa in the hobby. This is an extremely bright zoa, with an yellow skirt, orange face and blue center, it is easy to see why this is such a desired zoanthid.

products.title: TG White Tip Toadstool Leather
products.body_html: The Tidal Gardens White Tip Toadstool Leather is a unique leather coral that has a green and white base with white polyp tips. This is a very easy coral to care for, and can grow quite large.

products.title: Radioactive Ricordea Yuma
products.body_html: The Radioactive Ricordea Yuma is a bright green piece that gets purple undertones and bubbly vesicles. This piece is one of the slower growing Yuma corals. This is a great piece for any collector, and will surely be one of the brightest corals in your tank.

products.title: Sunny D Zoas
products.body_html: Bright yellow and green, these zoas will surely be one of the brightest in any collection.

products.title: RRG Sunbeam Tiger Zoas
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Sunbeam Tiger Zoas are bright orange zoas with green and yellow centers. Individual polyps can get large, and they are fast growing zoas. These look fantastic in a colony.

products.title: RRG Leprechaun Dust Glitter Goni
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Leprechaun Dust Glitter Goni is an extremely unique green glitter goniopora with bright orange mouths. This piece is unlike any glitter goniopora we have seen. Prefers lower light and medium/high flow.

products.title: WWC Sunfire Grafted Monti
products.body_html: This stunning montipora is better than a normal red and green grafted monti as it has bright yellow polyps.

products.title: Poseidon Discosoma
products.body_html: The Poseidon Discosoma is a unique mushroom that has a dark blue base and gets blue bubbles. It can also develop a green outer ring which gives it a unique appearance. It can grow fast as it "walks" around it's surface and drops clones from its foot.

products.title: RRG Paint Splatter Master Bower
products.body_html:
The RRG Paint Splatter Master Bower is essentially a master bowerbanki with red/orange, yellow, green, and purple. This incredible piece is everything a bower-lover could dream for. The outer colors are a deep red/orange with yellow streaks, while the inside colors are a bright to deep green with purple running along the mouth. 

First two pictures are in high-def, while the 3rd picture is in white light. This frag is on a large Ocean Wonders frag plug.

products.title: Blue Raven Blasto
products.body_html: Classic Blastomussa merleti that is bright red with a blue mouth. Very bright blasto that prefers low light and low flow. Great for beginners.

products.title: CC Voodoo Majick
products.body_html: The CC Voodoo Majick is a beautiful orange acropora with long whispy green polyps. This acro prefers very high light and high flow.

products.title: RRG Skittles Goni
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Skittles Goni is one of the nicest gonis we have seen. This rainbow goni has pinks, blues, yellows and seems to develop more colors each day.

products.title: WWC Pink Boobies Chalice
products.body_html: The WWC Pink Boobies chalice is a beautiful bright pink chalice with yellow eyes. This is a beginner-friendly piece that is extremely hardy and fast growing. In high light the bright pink colors will develop.

products.title: Biohazard Chalice
products.body_html: The Biohazard Chalice is a unique neon green chalice. This piece has a mainly purple base with neon green dots and streaks throughout the coral. This piece is a slow grower but is relatively easy to maintain.

products.title: Blue Raven Blasto
products.body_html: Classic Blastomussa merleti that is bright red with a blue mouth. Very bright blasto that prefers low light and low flow. Great for beginners.

products.title: RRG Emerald City Bounce Disco
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Emerald City Bounce Disco is one of the nicest bounce discos that we have found. This piece has a dark green base with bright baby blue bounces. It is a incredible piece that is perfect for any mushroom collector.

products.title: RRG Poison Apple Bowerbanki
products.body_html:
The Reef Regeneration Poison Apple Bowerbanki is one of the nicest master bowers we have seen. This incredible piece has the staple neon green and red of a bleeding apple bower; but what really sets it apart is the bright blue/purple colors that streak throughout the piece. This is a must have collector's master bower. 

This incredible piece has bright purple streaks with green flecks throughout the coral. Last picture is of our mother colony.

products.title: RRG Paint Splatter Jawbreaker with Purple Streak
products.body_html:
The Reef Regeneration Paint Splatter Jawbreaker is one of the nicest strains of jawbreaker out there. This strain is essentially what is now being called a "Purple Monster," as it gets small streaks of purple. However, this piece stands out due to the bright green and red colors that streak throughout this mushroom. 

*This exact piece has a small purple streak in the green of the mushroom. The last two pictures are of the mother colony.

products.title: RRG Guy Fieri Montipora
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Guy Fieri Montipora is unlike any other monti you will see. This bright yellow montipora has large streaks and splotches of neon red, and then also has bright red polyps. Unlike virtually any other monti, this piece is extremely slow growing - on-par with master bowers for growth rates. This is definitely one of the most unique corals in the hobby, we have never seen anything like this.

products.title: UC Disruption Monti
products.body_html: The UC Disruption Monti has blue polyps and a base color that can shift from pink to dark orange. In lower light the color shifts to orange, and in high light it shifts to pink.

products.title: Aquacultured Master Scolymia with Teal
products.body_html: This is by far the nicest scoly we have come across. This incredible piece is 100% aquacultured, and has developed almost every available color. Incredibly, it has both dark blues, lighter blues around the mouth, and teal splotches at the edges. This piece is extremely hardy and very fleshy as it has been raised in captivity.

products.title: OG ASD Holy Grail Torch Splitter
products.body_html:
The nicest torch in our collection and one of the most desired in the hobby, the OG ASD Holy Grail is an incredible piece with bright blue tips and yellow tentacles that become green towards the mouth. This is not one of the many newly imported "holy grails" that will either not be as bright as the original or will melt in captivity. This is a fully aquacultured piece that has been growing in captivity for years. This is one of the hardiest torches in our collection. 

This frag is a large splitting head on a large Ocean Wonders plug. Last picture is an example of a larger piece.

products.title: RRG Paint Splatter Jawbreaker
products.body_html:
The Reef Regeneration Paint Splatter Jawbreaker is one of the nicest strains of jawbreaker out there. This strain is essentially what is now being called a "Purple Monster," as it gets small streaks of purple. However, this piece stands out due to the bright green and red colors that streak throughout this mushroom. 

The first and last pictures are of the frag available, the middle two pictures are of the mother.

products.title: Grafted RRC Pink Cadillac
products.body_html: This Grafted RRC Pink Cadillac is a stunning piece of a classic old-school acro that has developed neon green pigments running throughout the coral. This will be an incredible colony when fully grown-out.

products.title: Rainbow Incinerator Zoas
products.body_html: These zoas can morph, going from a mainly green zoa to one thats bright orange and yellow.

products.title: RRG Confetti Master Bower
products.body_html: The RRG Confetti Master Bower is an extremely special bowerbanki. This incredible piece has extremely colorful baby polyps, with a pinwheel of rainbow colors. Mature polyps are dark gray/blue with a bright red/orange skirt and a deep green mouth. A true collectors piece.

products.title: Looney Tunes Stylocoeniella
products.body_html: Probably the nicest Stylocoeniella in the hobby, this is by all definitions a rainbow coral. This coral is getting harder to find, it can be more temperamental than other encrusting corals.

products.title: TSA Circus Freak Zoas
products.body_html: The TSA Circus Freak Zoas are an extremely bright red rimmed zoa with a yellow and blue center. These are among the most unique zoas in our collection.

products.title: WWC Yellow Submarine Zoas
products.body_html: Yellow submarine zoas have a bright blue mouth surrounded by a yellow ring. Fast growing micro zoas that can quickly grow into a beautiful colony.

products.title: UC Amazeball Goni XL
products.body_html:
Our UC Amazeball has been aquacultured for years, it is extremely hardy. Will not randomly melt like wild gonis. One of the nicest gonis in the hobby, extremely bright red goni with yellow skin. 

This XL frag is on a large plug, and is encrusting onto the plug. Great growout colony for any high end collector.

products.title: RRG Mechagodzilla Yuma
products.body_html: The Reef Regeneration Mechagodzilla Yuma is a beautiful spin on the original Godzilla yuma. This yuma has an orange ring with little striations like the doughboy, and also has a green center.
